name: Pistachio Ambrosia
recipeIngredient: 4 packages Instant pistachio pudding mix (3.4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the fruit cocktail, pineapple, and oranges, reserving 3 cups of juice. Set the fruit aside.
2. Pour the reserved juice into a 4-quart bowl.
3. Add the pudding mix and stir until smooth.
4. Stir in the sour cream.
5. Add the whipped topping and stir until smooth.
6. Fold in the fruit.
7. Chill for several hours.
8. Top with pecans, if desired, just before serving.
